---
title: "WiL 2026 Programme"
format: html
---

## July 24, 2026

| Time | Type | Title | Speakers / Authors |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **09:00–10:20** | 📘 Session | **Formal Verification** | |
| 09:00–09:20 | 📝 Talk | Discourse analysis of mathematical texts | Gwenaelle Leon |
| 09:20–09:40 | 📝 Talk | Towards Verifiable Higher-Order Automated Reasoning | Melanie Trappoge |
| 09:40–10:00 | 📝 Talk | Growing HOLMs: Grzegorczyk Logic and Experiments with Translations in HOL Light | Antonella Bilotta; Cosimo Perini Bigri; Marco Maggesi |
| 10:00–10:20 | 📝 Talk | Formal verification of security protocols with certification | R. Ramanujam; Vaishnavi Sundararajan; S. P. Suresh |
| **10:20–10:40** | 📘 Session | **Quantum Logic** | |
| 10:20–10:40 | 📝 Talk | Quantum Coherence Spaces Revisited: A von Neumann (Co)Algebraic Approach | T. Li, V. Zamdzhiev |
| **10:40–11:00** | ☕ Break | **Coffee Break** | |
| **11:00–12:00** | 🌟 Invited Talk | Logic and the World: Some Reflections on the Relationship Between the Two | Sara Uckelman |
| **12:00–12:40** | 📘 Session | **Semantics** | |
| 12:00–12:20 | 📝 Talk | A Truthmaker Semantics for Positive Free Logic | Ragna Talea Oeynhausen |
| 12:20–12:40 | 📝 Talk | Reflexivity and the Blocking of Semantic Paradox | Shuwen Wu |
| **12:40–14:00** | 🍽️ Break | **Lunch** | |
| **14:00–15:00** | 🌟 Invited Talk | The Cost of Restricting Structural Rules | Raheleh Jalali |
| **15:00–16:00** | 📘 Session | **Answer Set Programming** | |
| 15:00–15:20 | 📝 Talk | Answer Set Programming goes to School | Racquel Dennison; Emmanuelle Dietz; Hanna Philipp |
| 15:20–15:40 | 📝 Talk | Towards Resilience in the Multi-Batching Problem: An Answer Set Programming Approach for Industrial Logistics | Racquel Nina Dennison |
| 15:40–16:00 | 📝 Talk | Recovering Suppressed Entailments in OWL 2 DL via Two-Phase Reasoning | Giulia Biagioni |
| **16:00–16:20** | ☕ Break | **Coffee Break** | |
| **16:20–17:00** | 📘 Session | **Computability** | |
| 16:20–16:40 | 📝 Talk | Free Sets, Thin Sets and Rainbows for Barriers | Lorenzo Carlucci; Oriola Gjetaj |
| 16:40–17:00 | 📝 Talk | A Decision Algorithm for the CL15 Fragment of Computability Logic | Stella Spadoni |
| **17:00–17:40** | 📘 Session | **Type Theory** | |
| 17:00–17:20 | 📝 Talk | An Intercalation Calculus with Partial Proof Terms | Ana Catarina Sousa |
| 17:20–17:40 | 📝 Talk | Paradoxes and Proofs with Pointers | Paulette Koronkevich; William J. Bowman |

---

## July 25, 2026

| Time | Type | Title | Speakers / Authors |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **09:00–09:20** | 📙 Session | **Automata** | |
| 09:00–09:20 | 📝 Talk | Fuzzifying Derivatives of Regular Expressions | M. Katamashvili, D. Maisuradze (online) |
| **09:20–10:00** | 📙 Session | **Graph Theory** | |
| 09:20–09:40 | 📝 Talk | Eternal Relaxed Vertex Cover on Threshold Graphs | Ankita Kumari |
| 09:40–10:00 | 📝 Talk | Vertex Definability in Counting Logic | Sandra Kiefer |
| **10:00–10:40** | 📙 Session | **Algebraic Logic** | |
| 10:00–10:20 | 📝 Talk | When Queries Decompose: A Lattice-Theoretic Perspective on Incomplete Information | Eugenia Ternovska |
| 10:20–10:40 | 📝 Talk | Quad Algebras and a 4-Valued Non-Classical Logic | Arun Kumar; Bisham Dewan; Neha Gaur |
| **10:40–11:00** | ☕ Break | **Coffee Break** | |
| **11:00–12:00** | 📙 Session | **Epistemic Logic** | |
| 11:00–11:20 | 📝 Talk | Social Network Aggregation Beyond Preservation | Yutong Yi |
| 11:20–11:40 | 📝 Talk | On the hyperintensionality of ignorance | Ekaterina Kubyshkina; Mattia Petrolo |
| 11:40–12:00 | 📝 Talk | Logical Modeling of Belief Polarization | Mina Young Pedersen; Sonja Smets |
| **12:00–12:20** | 📙 Session | **Dynamic Epistemic Logic** | |
| 12:00–12:20 | 📝 Talk | Axiomatising asynchronous announcements in dynamic epistemic logic | Clara Lerouvillois |
| **12:20–12:40** | 📙 Session | **Logic and ML** | |
| 12:20–12:40 | 📝 Talk | Toward Provably Defeasible Machine Learning | Ruvarashe Madzimire |
| **12:40–14:00** | 🍽️ Break | **Lunch** | |
| **14:00–15:00** | 🌟 Invited Talk | Logic, Proof, and Community: The Revolution Beneath the Revolution | Valeria de Paiva |
| **15:00–16:00** | 📙 Session | **Proof Theory** | |
| 15:00–15:20 | 📝 Talk | A Proof-Theoretic Treatment of Incorrect/Incomplete Proofs via Hilbert’s Epsilon Calculus | Mariami Gamsakhurdia |
| 15:20–15:40 | 📝 Talk | Double Negation Elimination and the Multiple Succedent Structure of LK | Nox Cowie |
| 15:40–16:00 | 📝 Talk | Schemata, Cyclic Proofs and Herbrand Systems | Alexander Leitsch, Anela Lolic, Stella Mahler |
| **16:00–16:20** | ☕ Break | **Coffee Break** | |
| **16:20–17:20** | 📙 Session | **Modal Logic** | |
| 16:20–16:40 | 📝 Talk | Improving Model Finding in Quantified Modal Logics | Happy Khairunnisa Sariyanto |
| 16:40–17:00 | 📝 Talk | Argumentation Based Dialogue Games for Deontic Explanations with Uncertainty | Isabella Cissell |
| 17:00–17:20 | 📝 Talk | Structural Dynamic Proof Theory for Public Announcement Logic | Clara Lerouvillois |

---

## Social event 18:30 TBA
